stemHtml: Aircraft certified under CS-23 and CS25 have to be able to show that they can avoid upset situations and unusual attitudes, as well as withstand and recover from them. Consider two identical aeroplanes, one with its CG at the FWD limit, the other with its CG at the AFT limit; which of the following statements is true regarding stability and manoeuvrability?

options.a: Stability increases as the CG moves aft.
options.b: Stability and manoeuvrability are not affected by CG position.
options.c: Stability decreases as the CG moves forward.
options.d: Manoeuvrability reduces slightly with a FWD CG compared to an AFT CG.
